## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Fleet client onboarding and new mini-sprint process implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Developing a pre-sprint "mini-sprint" package (\~$15-20K) to streamline onboarding and create a scalable business line](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Fleet client kickoff went well; focus on AI visibility and meetings booked as key metrics](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Enhancing artifact creation process to better incorporate kickoff call insights, especially for persona documents](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Implementing agentic pipeline setup as standard for all new clients](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

## Topics

### Mini-Sprint Package Development

  - [Creating a 1-2 week package for client onboarding and initial strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Includes: kickoff call, artifact creation, SEO/site/AEO audits, content strategy in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Priced at \~$15-20K, aimed at companies not ready for full agency service](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Scalable model: potential to do 20 mini-sprints/month with team expansion](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Aligns with improving Atlas platform and AI-led growth community](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### Fleet Client Onboarding

  - [Client team energetic and engaged; less complex than recent cybersecurity clients](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Primary focus: AI visibility (top metric) and meetings booked (long-term goal)](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Need to simplify 40+ roles/titles into two main audiences: decision-makers and tool users](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Key contacts: Brad (technical), Irene, Lupin, Mike T (brand)](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [CMS likely GitHub-based; team to follow up on specifics](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Artifact Creation Process Improvement

  - [Current: Raw transcript → What We Heard doc → Artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Proposed: Raw transcript → Enhanced persona doc → Better-informed artifact](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Goal: Capture more detailed insights from kickoff calls in a structured format](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Enables potential future automation of artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Agentic Pipeline Implementation

  - [Push to set up agentic pipeline for all new clients from the start](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Creating a template for good artifacts and sample pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Standardizing process to ensure consistent quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gXHGrPK9Ta52cyDdsd7pwav64LzUn9gh?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
